name: 蔡坦欣
objective:
本課主旨在設計課程，提供練習，俾使學生嫻熟各式的英語測驗，如全民英檢、托福測驗、TOEIC 測驗或類似性質的測驗，希冀能夠藉由本課程的修習，提升學生不斷的學習外國語的興致，並且，藉由通過考試取得證照，增加未來職場的競爭力。
This course is designed to familiarize the students with various kinds of language proficiency tests such as GEPT, TOEFL, TOEIC and many others to the same end. It is our hope that the students who finish taking the course will go on with their enthusiasm on studying foreign languages; besides, through the acquisition of the certificate when the students pass the tests, they are sure to enhance their capability in the increasingly competitive job markets.
schedule:
Week 1: Introduction 
Week 2, 3: Part 1-7
Week 4, 5: U1, 2 (10/9 Break) 
Week 6, 7: U3, 4
Week 8: Review	
Week 9: Midterm Exam
Week 10-11: U5,6
Week 12-13: U7,8
Week 14-15: U9,10
Week 16-17: U11-12
Week 18: Final Exam

This Syllabus may be subject to change or revisions to optimize the educational effect.
scorePolicy:
1. Performance/Quizzes/Assignments 20%
2. Midterm 25%
3. Final 25%
4. Attendance 10% (Five unexcused absences will result in automatic failure of the course)
5. 會考 20%
materials: TOEIC 全面備戰：7 大題型應考策略 + 13 大情境必備詞彙. LiveABC, 2020.
課程是否導入AI: ● 使用生成式 AI 作為教學過程的輔助工具（Use generative AI tools as an aid to the teaching process）
